videos.title: Utah Is Splitting Open - Why Is No One Talking About It?
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: A massive crack system is reshaping parts of Utah, revealing powerful geological forces that are slowly pulling the landscape apart. videos.title: Earth Is in Danger!? Volcanoes Around the World Waking Up
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description:
Around the world, volcanoes that have remained quiet for years—or even decades—are showing signs of renewed activity.

videos.title: Scientists Found Proof Human Species Interbred
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: Scientists are beginning to realize something surprising - the human family tree may be far more complex than we ever imagined. videos.description: Scientists designed a giant wheel in space pushed further than ever before! videos.title: A supervolcano that once shook the Earth is quietly recharging
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: A supervolcano responsible for one of the most powerful eruptions in human history is showing signs of renewed activity after more than 7,000 years.
